summary: Tested responsive UI fixes across the app. All tests passed: no horizontal overflow at any viewport (375px mobile, 768px tablet, 1920px desktop), Arabic fonts (Amiri, IBM Plex Sans Arabic) load correctly with proper line-height (1.7 for body, 1.5 for headings), dialogs properly sized on mobile (359px within 375px viewport), touch targets meet 40px minimum, RTL direction working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: index.css has overflow-x: hidden on html and body to prevent horizontal scroll
VERIFIED: Arabic typography line-height 1.7 for body, 1.5 for headings (Amiri font)
VERIFIED: Dialog mobile sizing via [role='dialog'] media query - width: calc(100vw - 1rem)
VERIFIED: Button min-height 40px for touch targets on mobile
VERIFIED: Container padding responsive (0.75rem on mobile, 1.5rem on tablet)
VERIFIED: RTL direction set on html element

test_credentials.note: No authentication required for responsive UI testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsive UI fixes verified. Key CSS changes working: 1) overflow-x: hidden prevents horizontal scroll, 2) Arabic fonts load with proper line-height, 3) Dialogs responsive on mobile, 4) Touch targets 40px minimum. All pages tested: Landing, Login, Teachers at 375px, 768px, 1920px viewports.

verified_features.landing_page_mobile_375: PASSED - No overflow, fonts loaded, layout correct
verified_features.login_page_mobile_375: PASSED - No overflow, form inputs visible, touch targets adequate
verified_features.teachers_page_mobile_375: PASSED - No overflow, cards display correctly
